project_setup.description: A high-contrast, brutalist-inspired Swiss design emphasizing authority, precision, and clarity. Sharp edges, strict grids, and stark color contrasts to make legal data highly legible and 'cool/technical'.
project_setup.file_extension_note: Use .js and .jsx files for React components, not .tsx.

spacing_and_layout.global_spacing: Generous outer padding (p-8 or p-12), dense internal padding for data (p-2, p-4)
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid for dashboard widgets (tight gap-4/6). Border-collapse technical style for layout sections.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all data, right-alignment for dates and numbers.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-black/90 rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border border-black hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-none px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-blue-800 rounded-none px-6 py-2

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white border border-black p-6 rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-x-[-2px] hover:translate-y-[-2px] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all
cards.public_document: bg-[#F5F5F0] border border-[#D1D5DB] p-12 max-w-4xl mx-auto shadow-lg

table.style: Dense, cardless. border-collapse. th: bg-gray-50 border-y border-black font-semibold text-black uppercase tracking-wider text-xs. td: border-b border-gray-200 py-3 px-4 text-sm. Hover: bg-gray-50.
table.special_columns: Case Number uses IBM Plex Mono. Dates right-aligned.

badges.opened: bg-[#002FA7] text-white px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none
badges.closed: bg-black text-white px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none
badges.adjourned: bg-[#FFD700] text-black px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none border border-black

inputs.style: border border-black bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm rounded-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:ring-offset-2

images.description: Minimalist brutalist courthouse architecture for the login page split-screen background.

motion.modals: Slide-in from right for forms (Shadcn Sheet) to feel like opening a drawer in a filing cabinet.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for text. Hover states explicitly define text colors.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-google-btn', data-testid='add-case-btn').

pages_instructions.login: Split screen layout. Left side: The architectural image, absolute fill, with a subtle black/20 overlay. Right side: Centered login form, minimal. 'CASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM' in huge Outfit font. Google SSO button prominent with a Google icon and sharp black border.
pages_instructions.dashboard: Sidebar for navigation (Cases, Settings). Top header for user profile. Main area has a summary row (Active Cases, Upcoming Adjournments). Below is the main Case Data Table. Top right of table area has 'Add Case' button (opens Shadcn Sheet). Table rows have a Shadcn DropdownMenu for Edit/Delete/Copy Public Link actions.
pages_instructions.public_case_view: Accessed via a public route. A read-only, beautifully typeset page using Playfair Display for headers and a warm off-white background (#F5F5F0) to resemble a premium legal document. Shows case details, current status, and adjournment dates clearly.
